# HeyFlou

> AI consulting and custom automation for SMBs — WhatsApp AI bots, lead pipelines, and CRM + email marketing for medical, travel, fitness, and education businesses.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of HeyFlou's AI automation offering.
- [Services](/services): Full catalog of AI automation services.
- [Healthcare](/services/healthcare): AI automation for clinics, therapists, and medical practices.
- [Fitness & Education](/services/fitness-education): Automation for gyms, studios, tutors, and schools.
- [Travel Agencies](/services/travel-agencies): AI automation for travel agencies and tour operators.
- [Custom Automation](/services/custom): Tailored AI workflows for any business.
- [Consulting](/services/consulting): AI strategy, readiness assessments, and implementation planning.
- [Case Studies](/case-studies): Real results from HeyFlou customers.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Plans and pricing.
- [About](/about): Who we are and what we believe.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch or book a strategy call.
